title: Xautoを呼び出して
summary_text: **Stale-run review (operator hygiene)** **Critical findings** 1. **P0: Backlog is mostly orphaned from claims, so current reconciler cannot clean it.** Local snapshot: `compact=49`, `stale≈43`, `active claims=0`. Reconciler only iterates active claims, so orphan compact/ledger rows persist indefinitely. Refs: [kernel-runtime-reconciler.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-runtime-reconciler.sh#L155), [kernel-runtime-reconciler.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-runtime-reconciler.sh#L158), [kernel-runtime-claim.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-runtime-claim.sh#L535) 2. **P0: Run completion does not close scheduler/ledger lifecycle, creating stale debt by design.** `run-complete` writes backup/compact only; no terminal scheduler-state write. Refs: [kernel-run-complete.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-run-complete.sh#L137), [kernel-run-complete.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-run-complete.sh#L143), [kernel-runtime-loop.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/kernel-runtime-loop.sh#L84) 3. **P1: `doctor` is read-focused and hides stale by default, but lacks an in-band cleanup action.** This weakens operator trust when stale count is high. Refs: [codex-kernel-guard.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/codex-kernel-guard.sh#L795), [codex-kernel-guard.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/codex-kernel-guard.sh#L850), [codex-kernel-guard.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/codex-kernel-guard.sh#L896) 4. **P1: `recover-run` refreshes compact freshness, which can mask stale state without true reconciliation.** Refs: [kernel-run-recovery.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-run-recovery.sh#L347), [kernel-run-recovery.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-run-recovery.sh#L245) 5. **P1: State-root defaults can drift from repo runtime artifacts, reducing observability consistency.** Refs: [kernel-state-paths.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-state-paths.sh#L49), [kernel-state-paths.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-state-paths.sh#L55), [codex-kernel-guard.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/codex-kernel-guard.sh#L166) **Highest-value implementation (single best investment)** Implement an **“orphan stale janitor”** in reconciler, then expose it from doctor: - Phase A: Keep current claim reconciliation. - Phase B: Scan compact runs with no active claim and age > TTL, verify no live run-driver, then: - set ledger scheduler state to `terminal` with explicit stale reason, - sanitize known compact noise, - archive compact to `compact/archive/` (or mark terminalized metadata), - emit machine-readable janitor report. **Primary file targets** - [kernel-runtime-reconciler.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-runtime-reconciler.sh) (add orphan stale sweep) - [kernel-scheduler.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/kernel-scheduler.sh#L357) (run janitor every tick/daemon cycle) - [codex-kernel-guard.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/codex-kernel-guard.sh#L795) (doctor summary + cleanup command/hint) - [kernel-run-complete.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-run-complete.sh#L137) (write terminal scheduler-state on successful completion) **Regression tests to add/update** - Extend [test-kernel-runtime-reconciler.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-kernel-runtime-reconciler.sh): orphan compact+ledger stale case, expect terminalization/archive. - Add `tests/test-kernel-stale-run-janitor.sh`: dry-run vs apply behavior, no active-claim false positives. - Extend [test-codex-kernel-guard-doctor-flags.sh](/Users/masayuki...
